EM REPORTS TREE DOWN ON MOBILE HOME FROM THUNDERSTORM WINDS. A TORNADO WAS REPORTED BY HAM OPERATORS, AND IS POSSIBLE, HOWEVER, RADAR INDICATED A COLLAPSING CELL IN THAT AREA AT THE TIME OF THE DAMAGE. TREE IS ON THE ROOF AND HAS CREASED/BENT THE ROOF DOWN AND IT IS LIKELY UNLIVABLE AT THIS TIME. RESIDENTS SOUGHT SHELTER BEFORE THE STORM AND NO INJURIES ARE REPORTED.

THERE WAS ALSO COMMERICAL PARK AND PRIVATE PROPERTY DAMAGE ON POWERS AVENUE AND BOWENDALE AVENUE. THE NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE IN JACKSONVILLE WILL COMPLETE A FULL TORNADO SURVEY FOR BOTH INTENSITY AND TRACK.

PRELIMINARY NWS DAMAGE SURVEY FOUND THE DAMAGE AT THE RV PARK INDICATED THE TORNADO WAS AN EF-2 WITH MAX SUSTAINED WINDS OF 128 MPH. THERE WERE MULTIPLE RVS FLIPPED OVER. TWO WERE FLIPPED COMPLETELY UPSIDE DOWN. ONE WAS FLIPPED AND BLOWN ABOUT 200 FEET INTO THE LAKE NORTH OF THE RV PARK ALONG WITH A PICKUP TRUCK. SEVERAL HARDWOOD TREES AT THE PARK WERE ALSO SNAPPED. THERE WAS DEBRIS FROM THE RVS SCATTERED THROUGHOUT THE PARK AREA.
RADAR CONFIRMED A TORNADO NEAR HEAVILY DAMAGED RV PARK NEAR KINGSBAY NAVAL SUBMARINE BASE. THIS TORNADO WILL SURVEYED BY THE NWS IN JACKSONVILLE, FL FOR BOTH INTENSITY AND TRACK.

CORRECTED STORM REPORT TO A TORNADO EVENT WHICH OCCURRED ON DECEMBER 8TH 2021. DAMAGE SURVEY RESULTS NOTED SEVERAL TREES DOWNED IN SOUTHEASTERN STARKE FL FROM THOMSON STREET TO WILSON ROAD NEAR THE SHANDS STARKE MEDICAL CENTER. SNAPPED TREES LANDED ON A FEW HOUSES CAUSING STRUCTURAL DAMAGE AND CAUSED ONE HOME TO SLIDE ON ITS FOUNDATION.

COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT HAS REPORTED SEVERAL TREES DOWNED BETWEEN THE END OF SOUTH CHURCH ST TO REDGRAVE ST IN SOUTHEASTERN STARKE FL. AT LEAST ONE HOME HAS SUSTAINED SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE. A METEOROLOGIST WILL ASSESS THE DAMAGE TOMORROW TO DETERMINE IF IT WAS CAUSED BY A TORNADO OR STRAIGHT-LINE WINDS.
EMERGENCY MANAGER REPORTS POSSIBLE TORNADO. DAMAGE INCLUDES TREES DOWN, MINOR ROOF DAMAGE AS WELL AS SOME LINES DOWN IN THE ROPER VICINITY. TIME IS APPROXIMATE FROM RADAR IMAGERY.
REPORT OF 2 HOMES WITH ROOF DAMAGE, AND TREES DOWNED. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR.
EMERGENCY MANAGER REPORTS POSSIBLE TORNADO. DAMAGE INCLUDES TREES AND POWER LINES DOWN NEAR THE DENTON AREA. TIME IS APPROXIMATE FROM RADAR IMAGERY.
